name: rate-limiter
description: Full-stack rate limiter — Node.js server with C++ (N-API) algorithms + Next.js frontend, five algorithms.

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: make -C backend clean && rm -rf frontend/.next backend/build backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules
